li.label: crude road built
li.description: A simple dirt path connects our people to the wider world.

li.label: road built
li.description: A proper stone road strengthens our connections.

li.label: engineered route built
li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.label: engineered route built

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built

li.label: no recent road built
li.description: Our settlements remain disconnected. We must build roads and railways.

li.label: terrible groundbreaking
li.description: The ceremony was an embarrassment.

li.label: boring groundbreaking
li.description: The ceremony was uninspired.

li.label: good groundbreaking
li.description: The Surveyor's speech was inspiring.

li.label: glorious groundbreaking
li.description: A triumphant beginning to a great project.

li.label: terrible opening of the line
li.description: The ceremony was a disaster. Everyone felt embarrassed.

li.label: boring opening of the line
li.description: The ceremony was forgettable.

li.label: good opening of the line
li.description: A fine celebration of the new route.

li.label: glorious opening of the line
li.description: The celebration was unforgettable. Everyone felt the weight of history in the new connection.
